pages.text:
—7.-

ZULL PQ/T

Wwins the Comnonweaith-French War Graves Agreement relative to the graves of mambers of the Armed Forces of the commonwealth countries who fall in the wars of 1914-1918 or 1939-1945, and whose remains rest in French territory, has been approved by the Governnent of India and the

Governments of other Commonwealth countrles, and the

Government of the French Republic;

AND WHOREds It Is expedient that a fit person should be appointed as Plenipotentiary and Representative having

Full Power and Authority to sign the said Agreement for and on behalf of the Government of India;

I, RAJENDRA FRADAD, President of India, do hereby certify that Sardar Hardit singh Malik, my Ambassador to France at Paris has been and is by these

Presents confirmed as duly naned, constituted and appointed as Plenipotentiary and Representative having Full POwer and authority to sign the aforesaid Agreement for and on behalf of the Government of India.

Further, I do hereby certify that the Agreement so signed by the sald Plenipotentiary and Representative shall be agreed to, acknowledged and accepted by the government of Indis in the fullest manner, subject to ratification, Il necessary.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF I have signed these Presents and affixed thereto my Seal,

DONE at New Delhi, the 3'4

Day of Angush 1951.

PRES IDENT GE INDIA.
